dataset.name: ISMS CORE Control Groups
dataset.description: 53 control groups that form the ISMS CORE stacking model. Each group covers one or more ISO 27001:2022 Annex A controls.

metadata.notes: Also absorbs A.6.1 (Screening) and A.6.2 (Terms and conditions of employment)

objects.name: Contact with Authorities and Special Interest Groups
Inventory of Information and Other Associated Assets
Acceptable Use of Information and Other Associated Assets

metadata.notes: 5 controls covering supplier management and cloud services
5 controls covering the full incident management lifecycle
Cross-section stacking: A.5 organisational + A.8 technological controls for BC/DR

objects.name: Legal, Statutory, Regulatory and Contractual Requirements

metadata.notes: 4 sub-policies in Framework for legal/regulatory complexity

objects.name: Information Security Awareness, Education and Training
Remote Working and Security Event Reporting
Physical Security Perimeters and Access Control
Secure Areas and Information Media Handling
Secure System Architecture and Engineering Principles
Separation of Development, Test and Production Environments
Test Information and Protection of Information Systems During Audit Testing
